## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related issue

Link issue(s) with `Fixes #...` or `Refs #...`.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tests

## How to test

List exact steps to verify this PR.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `cargo fmt`.
- [ ] I ran `cargo check`.
- [ ] I ran `cargo test`.
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for my changes.
